steps.t: Atharon has suggested that Rendis may be hiding out in a nearby cave. You should search the forest west of Imloth Melui.
While searching the hills west of Imloth Melui, you have come across a cave-mouth. You should explore the cave for any sign of Rendis or her books.
Rendis has been found and has promised to return to the city of Imloth Melui. She has asked you to inform Brunil of her whereabouts and plans. Brunil …
